Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: 1 Analyze the Users Request Source Material A detailed Long Process Description of a property onboarding process for a large scale management company It covers steps from initial contact to final activation and quality checks involving various roles Coordinator Manager Photographer Inspector Marketing Compliance IT and decision points Role I am the interviewer listener who just heard this description Goal Ask targeted open ended questions to clarify and improve understanding of the process Specific Objectives of Questions Uncover missing details Understand decision criteria Clarify roles responsibilities RACI Verify timing sequencing Learn about exception handling Constraint No SQL queries or implementation details focus on conceptual process understanding

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: 2 Deconstruct the Process Description Identify Gaps Areas for Inquiry Phase 1 Initial Contact Documentation Current state Landlord contacts regional office Coordinator reviews docs deed certs inspection Missing outdated docs trigger updates Verified Data entry into DB Gaps Questions How is the request received Phone portal What defines outdated What happens if the landlord never provides updates Is there an SLA for verification Who owns the data entry accuracy Phase 2 Manager Assignment Current state Assign manager based on workload geo specialization experience track record Intro meeting happens Gaps Questions How is workload quantified If no manager fits eg too busy what happens Does the landlord have veto power How are special requirements defined captured before assignment Phase 3 Inspection Prep Current state Manager schedules photographer inspector Inspector finds issues repairs needed re inspection Passes Marketing creates listings pricing Gaps Questions Are these parallel or sequential tasks Who pays for contractors if repairs are needed landlord vs company What constitutes a fail vs minor issue How does marketing know when its ready Phase 4 Activation Tenant Screening Current state Property activated Screening credit employment refs Negotiations multiple tenants Lease finalization Deposit Move in date Gaps Questions When exactly does activation happen relative to the lease signing The text says activation makes it available to view but then screening happens implies activation is pre tenant How are conflicting applications handled legally fairly What triggers a negotiation Phase 5 Quality Checks Audits Current state Compliance officer checks lease Financial analyst checks price IT checks data integrity Gaps Questions When do these audits occur Before or after move in The text says Finally suggesting post lease but that seems risky for compliance Do these block the process What if the analyst says the price is wrong General Cross Cutting Gaps Questions Communication tools mentioned email CRM How is status tracked globally What are the SLAs for each stage

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: 3 Drafting the Questions Iterative Refinement Category 1 Initiation Verification Draft How do they contact you Refinement You mentioned the landlord contacts the regional office what specific channels are used and how is the initial intake triaged before reaching the coordinator Draft What if docs are bad Refinement Regarding documentation review what specific criteria define a document as outdated and is there a maximum timeframe allowed for landlords to submit corrected documents before the case is closed or escalated Category 2 Assignment Logic Draft How do you pick the manager Refinement The assignment of the property manager relies heavily on qualitative factors like geographic specialization and track record Can you describe the specific scoring mechanism or decision matrix used to weigh workload against expertise Draft Can landlords say no Refinement To what extent does the landlord have input in selecting their property manager and what is the protocol if the assigned manager lacks availability immediately Category 3 The Inspection Repair Loop Draft Who pays for fixes Refinement When an inspector identifies issues requiring repairs how is the financial responsibility determined between the landlord and the management company and who authorizes third party contractors Draft How long does this take Refinement The repair cycle can be unpredictable are there Service Level Agreements SLAs regarding how long a property can remain in this inspection repair limbo state before affecting its priority in the queue Category 4 Marketing Pricing Draft How is price set Refinement You mentioned updating pricing models based on market trends At what specific point in the timeline is the final rental price locked in is it before the inspector goes out or only after the digital marketing team has assessed the asset Category 5 Tenant Screening Selection Draft What if two people want it Refinement In scenarios with multiple interested tenants you mentioned negotiating terms or prioritizing longer leases Could you elaborate on the companys formal policy for tenant selection to ensure fair housing compliance during these negotiations Draft When is the listing live Refinement There seems to be a dependency between activation in the portal and the readiness of the physical property Does the system allow for a soft launch where viewing is permitted before the unit is 100 ready or is activation strictly gated by the inspectors sign off Category 6 Final Audits Exceptions Draft When do auditors check stuff Refinement The final phase involves compliance finance and IT checks Chronologically do these audits happen after the lease is signed and deposit collected or do they act as a gatekeeper preventing the move in from occurring Draft Custom clauses Refinement For exceptions like custom lease clauses or special insurance at what point in the workflow are these flagged for legal review and does this create a separate swim lane or approval workflow outside the standard process Self Correction during drafting I initially thought about asking about database tables but the prompt explicitly forbids SQL implementation details I must stick to business logic Instead of How is the manager ID stored ask How is the manager selection recorded and communicated

Name: Validation - PE
Text: 4 Review against Constraints Open ended Yes Targeted Yes No SQL Yes Conceptual focus Yes

Name: Heuristic Reasoning - IND
Text: 5 Formatting Group questions logically by phase or theme for readability Ensure professional tone 6 Final Polish Organize into categories Initial Intake Assignment Logic Inspection Repair Marketing Tenant Flow and Audit Governance This structure helps the interviewee follow along
